title: statestore resolve output
description: Class-level, PROVIDER-AGNOSTIC (ADR-0105) statestore handle: the tool-backend config the consumer injects into its own state engine. `backend` names the tool backend TYPE (e.g. 's3','http','gcs'); `config` is that backend's string settings (bucket/key/region/endpoint/address/lock_address…); `credentialRef` is a §2.5 CredentialRef NAME for backend auth material — resolved at pod spawn, NEVER inline material. Every provider fills this same shape, so a provider swap (S3→Artifactory→GCS) changes zero consumer declarations (D1).
